entity.summary: On-chain decentralized exchange and liquidity venue focused on concentrated liquidity and oracle-driven execution. The official trading application and project site remain reachable, so HEI classifies Capricorn as active.
entity.notes: Candidate rows for the Capricorn parent are collapsed into this entity. Launch date remains null because this review did not recover a sufficiently strong launch marker.

evidence.title: Capricorn Exchange official website
evidence.notes: Official site presents the active liquidity venue and links to the trading application.

evidence.title: Capricorn exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory reference used to corroborate the candidate identity and trading venue classification.
